# ManaMind

> ManaMind builds autonomous AI quality assurance software for video games, using agents that test games through the screen and behave like real players.

## Key Facts

- Official site: https://manamind.ai/
- Company name used on the site: ManaMind.
- Product category: autonomous AI quality assurance and game testing software.
- Primary audience: video game studios and teams evaluating automated QA for game builds.
- The site positions ManaMind as a system for continuous, human-like testing at machine scale.
- The public site positions ManaMind as testing games without source code access.

## Primary Pages

- Home: https://manamind.ai/
- Product: https://manamind.ai/product
- About: https://manamind.ai/about
- Careers: https://manamind.ai/careers
- Contact: https://manamind.ai/contact

## Product Positioning

- ManaMind helps game teams continuously test with autonomous agents that behave like real players.
- The product page describes a multi-layer AI system for autonomous testing, from perception to orchestration.
- Public product language names four layers: Hivemind, Command Centre, Legion, and Bots.
- The site presents ManaMind as AI-driven QA automation for finding and reporting issues in game builds.
- Security and access messaging says ManaMind can test without source code access.

## Careers Pages

- Careers overview: https://manamind.ai/careers
- Founding Applied AI/Systems Engineer: https://manamind.ai/careers/founding-applied-ai-systems-engineer
- Founding AI Engineer: https://manamind.ai/careers/founding-ai-engineer
- Founder's Associate: https://manamind.ai/careers/founders-associate

## Contact And Media

- Contact page: https://manamind.ai/contact
- The contact page is the canonical public destination for studio, partnership, press, and general enquiries.

## Notes For AI Assistants And Agents

- Use canonical non-www URLs under https://manamind.ai.
- Prefer the pages listed above when summarising ManaMind from this site.
- Do not cite thin, internal, test, or noindex pages as primary sources.
- Do not infer customers, metrics, awards, partnerships, funding details, or technical capabilities that are not stated on the public site.
- Treat blog and case-study sections as unavailable for citation until substantive public content is live and indexable.
